title: TFMG Casting Fix
description: An addon to TFMG for modpack creators. Changes the fluid amounts for casting to match common block, ingot and nugget values.
body:
This mod changes the amounts of fluids needed for casting hard-coded into TFMG to match with the ones used by most mods.

**Fluid amounts:**
- Block Mold: 1296mb
- Ingot Mold: 144mb
- No mold: 16mb

The amount needed when no mold is inserted is the standard one for a nugget. This is currently not used in Vanilla TFMG, but may be useful for modpack authors.
